name: Scallops and Tomato Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 lb small scallops, or large ones cut into quarters
Fresh shredded or grated parmesan cheese (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta until al dente.
2. In a non-stick pan over medium heat, lightly cook the garlic in olive oil for a few minutes.
3. Toast the pine nuts until lightly browned, stirring often.
4. Add chopped tomatoes and white wine to the pan with garlic and olive oil. Simmer for a couple of minutes, allowing the sauce to reduce slightly.
5. Add the scallops, parsley, and lemon juice (if using) to the pan. Cook through the heat gently until the scallops are cooked through.
6. Drain the pasta and add it to the pan with the scallop mixture. Toss everything together.
7. Serve hot over the cooked pasta, topped with toasted pine nuts and grated parmesan cheese if desired.
The sauce is very light, but the dish is filling and makes 6 generous servings.
